title: Keely Structural Ratio PASS: 8 laws mapped to QA mod-9 invariants
_fixture_purpose: Certifies Keely's 8 structural ratio laws (Category 1, Vibes framework) as QA modular invariants. Each law states an exact integer constraint: orbit period, f-value, period divisibility, concordance, chromogeometry, or closure. Source: Keely via SVP (svpwiki.com); Vibes 5-category classification (2026-04-03).

2.name: Law of Corporeal Vibrations
2.keely_text: All coherent aggregates when isolated vibrate at a given ascertainable pitch
2.qa_mapping: Every state (b,e) has a definite orbit and period — a pitch determined by its modular class

4.name: Law of Harmonic Vibrations
4.keely_text: All coherent aggregates are perpetually vibrating at a period-frequency corresponding to some harmonic ratio of the fundamental pitch
4.qa_mapping: Derived coordinates d=b+e, a=b+2e are harmonic ratios of the generator pair; satellite period 8 divides cosmos period 24

9.name: Law of Cycles
9.keely_text: Coherent aggregates harmonically united constitute centers of vibration bearing relation to the fundamental pitch not multiples of the harmonic pitch
9.qa_mapping: Orbit families are NOT simple multiples; LCM(1,8,24)=24; coprime cycles synchronize at product

10.name: Law of Harmonic Pitch
10.keely_text: Any aggregate in a state of vibration develops a series of vibration in symmetrical sub-multiple portions of itself
10.qa_mapping: Cosmos-orbit generates sub-patterns at period 8 (satellite) and period 1 (singularity); 24 = 3x8 = 24x1

18.name: Law of Atomic Pitch
18.keely_text: Atoms have each a different and definite pitch at which they naturally vibrate
18.qa_mapping: Each (b,e) pair has unique f-value: f = b*b+b*e-e*e = norm in Q(sqrt(5))
18.integer_constraint: f is always an integer; orbit classification by v_3(f)

27.name: Law of Chemical Affinity
27.keely_text: Atoms whose atomic pitches are in either unison, harmonic or concordant ratios unite to form molecules
27.qa_mapping: States with concordant f-values (same orbit family) can compose; coupling strength from tuple alignment

29.name: Law of Chemical Transposition
29.keely_text: New molecules must be harmonics of the fundamental pitch
29.qa_mapping: Under generator application, new states remain in the same orbit; closure under modular arithmetic

33.name: Law of Chemical Morphology
33.keely_text: The angle of crystallization is determined by the relation between the molecular pitch to the variation-density of the liquid
33.qa_mapping: QA tuples determine geometric angles via chromogeometry: C=2de, F=d*d-e*e, G=d*d+e*e; C*C+F*F=G*G

witnesses.note: Satellite (3,3): f=9, period 8, generator preserves satellite orbit
